blocks.text: Glimt stun Inter — Norway's Champions League dream is real
Bodø/Glimt's 2-1 victory over Internazionale on Tuesday is Norway's biggest club result in decades. The press is daring to believe: 'Selvfølgelig kan Glimt vinne CL.'
⛷️ Biathlon Women's 15km Individual 16:05 — Røiseland, Tandrevold & Kirkeeide chase podium in Kontiolahti
